title: How (and why) to take a logarithm of an image
summary: 3Blue1Brown presents an exploration of Escher's Print Gallery through the lens of complex analysis, demonstrating how logarithmic transformations of images reveal underlying mathematical structure. The video illustrates conformal maps, complex exponentials, and complex logarithms as tools for understanding both the artwork and deep mathematical principles.
